ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the state */,
  "estimated_budget" REAL /* Estimated annual budget of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the zip code is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the zip code area */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the zip code in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the zip code area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "walk_scores" (
  "walk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each walk score */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "walk_score" INTEGER /* Walkability score (0-100) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the walk score was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the walk score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("walk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walk_scores_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_scores" (
  "transit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit score */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "transit_score" INTEGER /* Transit score (0-100) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the transit score was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transit score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transit_scores_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_scores" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike score */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "bike_score" INTEGER /* Biking score (0-100) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the bike score was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the bike score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_scores_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data point */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_populations_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_metrics_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Walk Score, Transit Score) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_metrics_history_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city plan */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., proposed, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the city plan */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the plan */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the plan */,
  "responsible_agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for implementing the plan */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person responsible for the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_plans_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
